license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d659g5
title: Cloning with NEB Instant Sticky-end Ligase Master Mix (M0370)
author: Harold Bien

steps_raw.instruction: Place master mix tube on ice and flick a few times to mix. Instant Sticky-end Ligase Master Mix - 50 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0370S
Combine 20–100 ng of vector with a 3-fold molar excess of insert and q.s. to 5μl with dH 2 O. undetermined

Add 5 μl of Instant Sticky-end Ligase Master Mix, mix thoroughly by pipetting up and down 7-10 times, and place on ice. The sample is now ready to be used for transformation. undetermined Instant Sticky-end Ligase Master Mix - 50 rxns New England Biolabs Catalog #M0370S
Aliquot 50 μl of cells into a 1.5 ml microcentrifuge tube. undetermined
Add 2 μl of the ligation reaction to the cells and mix by finger-flicking. Do not vortex the tube. undetermined
Incubate the tube on ice for 30 minutes. Do not mix. 00:30:00
Return tube to ice for 2 minutes. 00:02:00
Add 950 μl recovery media (e.g. SOC) to the tube undetermined
Incubate for one hour at 37°C with rotation or shaking (200–250 rpm). 01:00:00
Spread 100 μl of the outgrowth (undiluted or diluted 1:5 with recovery media) onto appropriate antibiotic selection plates and incubate overnight at 37°C. undetermined
